options.name: <pin_or_clock_list>
options.description: List of pins, ports or clocks to associate with the clock latency

options.name: -clock
options.description: Associates clock latency constraint with specific clock

options.name: -clock_gate
options.description: Specifies local clock latency on pin or port objects

options.name: -early
options.description: Specifies clock arrival time with respect to the early time of the clock signal

options.name: -fall
options.description: Specifies the fall value of the waveform signal

options.name: -jitter
options.description: Specifies dynamic portion of source clock latency value

options.name: -late
options.description: Specifies clock arrival time with respect to the late time of the clock signal

options.name: -max
options.description: Specifies the clock latency for max operating corner

options.name: -min
options.description: Specifies the clock latency for min operating corner

options.name: -rise
options.description: Specifies the rise value of the waveform signal

options.name: -source
options.description: Specifies source latency. If not specified, network latency is applied
